VPRS — non-spinnaker TCCs, three races, one discard, A8 tie-break

A non-spinnaker VPRS class is scored on each boat's "No spin" TCC — the same static time-on-time path, just the other coefficient (the per-fleet spin/non- spin choice is made when handicaps are entered, so the engine sees one applied vprsTcc). TCCs are real DBSC 2026 no-spin values. Three races with a single discard; Boomerang and Optique finish level on net points and split on RRS A8.2 (last-race count-back).

Scoring configuration: 1 discard from race 3. DNF/OCS scoring: A5.2 (series entries).

Start 14:00:00 (50400 s) every race. CT = ET × TCC, half-up to whole seconds.
No-spin TCCs: Boomerang 0.945, Optique 0.954, Sweet Martini 0.789.

Race 1
  Sweet Martini ET 4300  CT 4300×0.789 = 3392.70 → 3393  → 1
  Boomerang     ET 3600  CT 3600×0.945 = 3402.00 → 3402  → 2
  Optique       ET 3580  CT 3580×0.954 = 3415.32 → 3415  → 3
Race 2
  Optique       ET 3460  CT 3460×0.954 = 3300.84 → 3301  → 1
  Boomerang     ET 3500  CT 3500×0.945 = 3307.50 → 3308  → 2
  Sweet Martini ET 4250  CT 4250×0.789 = 3353.25 → 3353  → 3
Race 3 (Sweet Martini DNF → entries+1 = 4)
  Boomerang     ET 3550  CT 3550×0.945 = 3354.75 → 3355  → 1
  Optique       ET 3540  CT 3540×0.954 = 3377.16 → 3377  → 2

Raw points       R1 R2 R3   total   (discard worst)   net
  Boomerang       2  2  1      5      drop R1 (2)       3
  Optique         3  1  2      6      drop R1 (3)       3
  Sweet Martini   1  3  4(DNF) 8      drop R3 (4)       4
Boomerang and Optique tie on net 3; A8.1 (sorted non-discards [1,2] each)
still level; A8.2 counts back the last race: Boomerang 1 beats Optique 2.
Rank Sail Number Boat Competitor R1 R2 R3 Total Nett
1st IRL1367 Boomerang (4.0 DNF) 4.0 DNF 4.0 DNF 12.0 8.0
1st IRL1725 Optique (4.0 DNF) 4.0 DNF 4.0 DNF 12.0 8.0
1st IRL5013 Sweet Martini (4.0 DNF) 4.0 DNF 4.0 DNF 12.0 8.0

R1 — 1 Jan 2025

Rank Sail Number Boat Competitor Points
IRL1367 Boomerang 4.0 DNF
IRL1725 Optique 4.0 DNF
IRL5013 Sweet Martini 4.0 DNF

IRL1367 Boomerang 4.0 DNF
IRL1725 Optique 4.0 DNF
IRL5013 Sweet Martini 4.0 DNF

IRL5013 Sweet Martini 4.0 DNF
